mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_warnings (user_id, reason, challenge_id, status) VALUES (#{hostId}, 'AUTO_APPROVAL', #{challengeId}, 'ACTIVE')
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user_warnings WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND status = 'ACTIVE'
SELECT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM ( SELECT status FROM user_verifications WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY applied_at DESC, id DESC LIMIT 1 ) latest WHERE latest.status = 'APPROVED' )
mapper.update: UPDATE user_verifications SET status = 'REVOKED' WHERE id = ( SELECT id FROM user_verifications WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND status = 'APPROVED' ORDER BY applied_at DESC, id DESC LIMIT 1 )
UPDATE user_warnings SET status = 'RESOLVED' WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND status = 'ACTIVE'
